title: Briouat with Crispy Sea Bass
description: A Moroccan-inspired dish featuring crispy sea bass and sweet briouat pastry, perfect for a light dinner.

ingredients.name: briouat pastry
ingredients.notes: Available in most middle eastern grocery stores

ingredients.name: crispy oil
ingredients.notes: Use a neutral-tasting oil for frying

ingredients.name: magical paprika
ingredients.notes: Add a pinch of magic to your dish

ingredients.name: salt and pepper
ingredients.notes: Use freshly ground pepper for best flavor

ingredients.name: lemon wedges
ingredients.notes: Serve with a squeeze of fresh lemon juice

instructions: Season the sea bass fillets with salt, pepper, and magical paprika.
Heat the crispy oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sea bass fillets to the skillet and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the sea bass to a baking sheet and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, bake the briouat pastry according to package instructions.
Serve the crispy sea bass on top of the warm briouat pastry with a squeeze of fresh lemon juice.
Garnish with additional paprika, if desired.
